problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Small. Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
